response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the songs 'Wasureji no Kotonoha' and 'Moechakka Fire'. The Reference JSON for 'Wasureji no Kotonoha' was partial; I relied on the audio and on-screen text for the missing chorus sections. For 'Moechakka Fire', the Reference JSON provided a good base, and I extended it using the audio. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal activity, and English translations maintain semantic continuity across song transitions and dialogue.

subtitles.original: 言の葉を紡いで微睡んだ泡沫
subtitles.english: Spinning words, I slumbered in a bubble

subtitles.original: 旅人迷い込む御伽の深い霧
subtitles.english: A traveler wanders into the deep mist of a fairy tale

subtitles.original: 求め探して彷徨ってやがて詠われて
subtitles.english: Seeking, searching, wandering, and finally being sung

subtitles.original: いつか失い奪われて消える運命でも
subtitles.english: Even if it is our fate to one day be lost or taken

subtitles.original: それは忘れられることなくここにある
subtitles.english: It will remain here without ever being forgotten
